label: The Refraction House
description: The Refraction House constitutes a private dwelling embedded within Kharion Meridian Confluence’s stepped glass terraces, its walls cut as a disciplined array of angled panes that split the meridian glare into fixed interior ribbons. A central atrium rises through the structure as a prismatic lightwell, calibrated to the laminar sky-sheets and sealed by a faceted oculus that admits only lattice-aligned illumination. Living chambers occupy alternating bands of radiance and engineered absolute shadow, their thresholds marked by narrow light-bridges whose color shifts with angle rather than time. Floors of dark crystalline tile preserve the city’s rectilinear grid in miniature, casting sharp-edged reflections that stabilize orientation within the house.
